serviceDescription: An area encompassing all the National Forest System lands administered by an administrative unit. The area encompasses private lands, other governmental agency lands, and may contain National Forest System lands within the proclaimed boundaries of another administrative unit. All National Forest System lands fall within one and only one Administrative Forest Area. Metadata and Downloads

documentInfo.Title: US Forest Service Administrative Forest Boundaries
documentInfo.Comments: An area encompassing all the National Forest System lands administered by an administrative unit. The area encompasses private lands, other governmental agency lands, and may contain National Forest System lands within the proclaimed boundaries of another administrative unit. All National Forest System lands fall within one and only one Administrative Forest Area. Metadata and Downloads
documentInfo.Subject: This data is intended for read-only use. These data were prepared to describe Forest Service administrative area boundaries. The purpose of the data is to provide display, identification, and analysis tools for determining current boundary information for Forest Service managers, GIS Specialists, and others.
documentInfo.Keywords: Region,Land Status,NFS Lands,Forest Number,boundaries,Forest Service Land Dataset,Forest Service Lands Program,Administrative Forest,Forest Name,USDA Forest Service
